outcome_blind_frozen_specification.research_question: Does unlevered monthly SPY exposure scaled down when trailing realized volatility is high improve risk-adjusted performance relative to fully invested SPY?
outcome_blind_frozen_specification.null_hypothesis: The strategy does not have a higher monthly Sharpe ratio than the matched SPY buy-and-hold benchmark.
outcome_blind_frozen_specification.instrument_selection: fixed before outcome access; not a dynamic stock pool
outcome_blind_frozen_specification.state_reset: validation and holdout each start fresh, independent strategy and benchmark Portfolio.us instances with exactly USD 40000

calendar_and_signal.consecutiveness: the 22 closes must be the exact consecutive accepted sessions ending at the final accepted XNYS session of the signal month
calendar_and_signal.decision_time: 20:05:00 America/New_York on that final accepted session
calendar_and_signal.raw_close_availability: same-session 20:00:00 America/New_York conservative Tiingo EOD convention; retrieved_at remains actual
calendar_and_signal.execution_time: open of the immediately following accepted session
calendar_and_signal.execution_price_observation: Tiingo unadjusted EOD daily-bar open is a retrospective realized-fill proxy at the accepted-session open; it is not official NYSE Arca auction O/Q and is forbidden for paper or live claims
calendar_and_signal.calendar_identity: each decision uses a rolling calendar epoch bound to an ICE/NYSE document public by decision_at; an optional later aggregate revision may be used only for US settlement if it becomes available after decision and by execution open, directly supersedes the decision calendar, preserves all session semantics through execution, and is separately hash-bound; the corrected 2026 ZoneInfo projection is reconstruction-only and never backdated
calendar_and_signal.annualized_volatility: sample standard deviation of exactly 21 log total returns with ddof=1 multiplied by sqrt(252)

shared_execution_and_accounting.requested_shares: frozen at decision time and never resized from the execution open
shared_execution_and_accounting.decision_price_binding: decision price value and SourceIdentity must equal the final close observation in the 22-session signal window
shared_execution_and_accounting.partial_cash: accepted shared-core outcome: actual fill may fall to the maximum affordable whole shares; requested shares stay unchanged; residual remains cash; no redistribution or leverage
shared_execution_and_accounting.pending_cash_nav_rule: Portfolio.nav includes pending receivables and unsettled sale proceeds

cohort_boundaries.entry: buy/rebalance at the first accepted open of each entry month
cohort_boundaries.intermediate_strategy_boundary: NAV after that opening rebalance, including its trade cost exactly once
cohort_boundaries.final_boundary: NAV after liquidation at the first accepted open after the final cohort
cohort_boundaries.strategy_lifecycle: enter at the first entry-month open, rebalance at each subsequent entry-month open, liquidate at final exit
cohort_boundaries.benchmark_lifecycle: buy once at the first entry-month open and liquidate only at final exit
cohort_boundaries.daily_processing: advance every accepted session, apply actions to both portfolios, and settle pending cash

metrics.maximum_drawdown: min(boundary_NAV / running_max_boundary_NAV - 1) over initial plus every monthly boundary

corporate_actions.runtime_action_identity: the one-off must hash and strictly parse all exact 34 projection rows before materializing the 15 events inside the validation reconstruction calendar; it binds the stage subset identity and rejects any execution-point action that differs
corporate_actions.deterministic_action_id_formula: spy-state-street- + sha256(official_projection_sha256 + '|SPY|' + ex_date_iso); the one-off derives this ID directly from the exact projection bytes and PR117 does not supply action IDs
corporate_actions.historical_availability_semantics: current State Street official history is used only to reconstruct realized events already effective by decision_at; source available_at and retrieved_at remain the actual 2026 retrieval time and are never backdated
corporate_actions.cash_distribution_entitlement: shares held immediately before ex-date open
corporate_actions.cash_ledger_credit: pay-date settlement through Portfolio pending cash
corporate_actions.overlap_drift_rule: any nonzero overlap is INPUT_BLOCKED; the count must never change silently

splits.historical_evidence_ceiling: all observations through 2026-06-30 are retrospective secondary evidence; no interval is described as untouched validation, holdout, or prospective evidence
splits.validation_query_rule: the query interval must equal 2018-01-02 through 2021-12-01 exactly
splits.holdout_query_rule: the separate query interval must equal 2021-12-01 through 2026-06-01 exactly
splits.holdout_access_rule: legacy private transport label only: inference B is a separate invocation requiring both (a) an immutable screen-A receipt recomputed from the exact 46 strategy and benchmark boundary NAVs, derived 45 returns, and all four screen gates and (b) a separately qualified and frozen inference-B calendar, action dimensions, and runtime input bundle; screen-A identities cannot substitute for inference-B identities

gates: strategy Sharpe minus benchmark Sharpe is greater than zero
strategy compounded net return is greater than zero
strategy annualized volatility is lower than benchmark annualized volatility
strategy maximum drawdown is greater than benchmark maximum drawdown under the frozen negative-sign convention

holdout_primary_inference.statistic: Sharpe(strategy paired monthly returns) - Sharpe(benchmark paired monthly returns)
holdout_primary_inference.draw_algorithm: for each replicate initial_index=floor(Random.random()*N); at every later position draw u=Random.random(); if u<1/6 draw a second Random.random() and set floor(random*N), otherwise use (previous+1) modulo N
holdout_primary_inference.invalid_replicate: INPUT_BLOCKED; no replicate may be skipped
holdout_primary_inference.shared_draw_rule: generate the frozen 10000 stationary-bootstrap paths and paired Sharpe-difference statistics exactly once, then derive both lower bounds from that same ordered statistic vector
holdout_primary_inference.quantile: for alpha in the fixed order 0.05 then 0.025, sort the one shared 10000-statistic vector; h=(n-1)*alpha; linearly interpolate between floor(h) and ceil(h)
holdout_primary_inference.pass_rule: both the local 5th-percentile lower bound and the distinct program-overlay 2.5th-percentile lower bound are strictly greater than zero

holdout_secondary_gates: strategy compounded net return is greater than zero
strategy annualized volatility is lower than benchmark annualized volatility
strategy maximum drawdown is greater than benchmark maximum drawdown under the frozen negative-sign convention

terminal_rules.completed_validation_gate_failure: RETROSPECTIVE_SECONDARY_SCREEN_A_FAIL; permanent closure; inference B remains unopened

real_execution_gate.screen_a_pass_effect: unlock a separate inference-B input qualification and invocation only; never create a strategy candidate
real_execution_gate.loader_scope: this exact validation bundle only; no generic schema, manifest, provider, database, or holdout loader

forbidden_changes: change costs, benchmark, cohort boundaries, or state reset semantics
change validation or holdout dates or cohort counts
change the action projection, exact runtime IDs, or zero-overlap assertion silently
change bootstrap draw order, seed, resample count, statistic, or quantile
add smoothing, a volatility floor, a hysteresis band, a minimum weight, leverage, redistribution, or discretionary repair

tiingo_raw_eod.availability_convention: raw close and EOD-row source use same-session 20:00 America/New_York; execution open event remains the accepted-session 09:30 open

official_state_street_distributions.availability_note: current official history is a retrospective realized-event reconstruction; SourceIdentity available_at and retrieved_at both remain the actual 2026 retrieval time

tiingo_amount_comparison.resolution: official State Street value controls every event; Tiingo is comparison-only and no automatic fusion is allowed

adjudication.next_action: independently accept this outcome-blind Issue 119 amendment and final code identities; only then may the current CLI consume the retrospective-secondary screen-A claim exactly once
